summary: This role presents a fundamental misalignment with your skills, as the requirement for high-level calculus and life-critical clinical deduction conflicts with your preference for procedural, protocol-driven work. Furthermore, the combination of high burnout risk, extreme physical exhaustion from 12-hour shifts, and mandatory night/weekend rotations makes it impossible to achieve the predictable hours and personal wellbeing you prioritize. The high-stakes legal liability and intense cognitive load of this career make it an unsustainable choice for your professional profile.
